institution.name: Columbia University in the City of New York

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia University in the City of New York rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.5k → $71.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia University in the City of New York rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.5k → $71.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia University in the City of New York fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Columbia University in the City of New York are 67% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($102.5k vs $61.5k).
